scripts.dev: npm run ensure-data && npm run migrate && concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:worker-delayed" "npm run dev:web-delayed"
scripts.dev:worker-delayed: wait-on tcp:3000 && cross-env API_URL=http://localhost:3000 INTERNAL_TOKEN=my_token npm run dev:worker
scripts.dev:web-delayed: wait-on tcp:3000 && cd web && npm start
scripts.ensure-data: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const dir=path.join('api','data'); if(!fs.existsSync(dir)) fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true});"
